Meditaon Music App - Product Requirements Document (MVP)
App Overview
The Meditation Music App is a mobile application providing users with curated meditation
music sets from featured artists. The app focuses on delivering high-quality meditation
experiences through artist-centered content, including artist stories and specialized meditation
music. Users can choose between guided meditations or pure music experiences of varying
durations.
A key differentiating feature is the GitHub-style calendar visualization that shows meditation
activity with color intensity based on minutes meditated each day. Users can view their progress
over time, track streaks, and share their meditation calendar (daily, monthly or yearly) on social
media, creating both motivation and community engagement.
Core Value Proposition: Experience meditation with music created by featured artists, learn
about the artists' stories, and track your meditation journey through an engaging visual calendar.
User Flows
First-Time User Flow
1. Download app from App Store/Google Play
2. Sign up (email, Apple, Google)
o If coming through arst referral link, discount is automacally applied
3. Brief onboarding about the app concept (introductory slides)
4. Arst selecon screen with searchbar
5. View arst informaon/story
6. Session setup:
o Duraon selecon
o Guided or music-only toggle (all tracks can be experienced either way)
7. Start meditaon session
8. Session compleon with share opon
9. Introducon to meditaon calendar (rst entry added)
10. If came through referral link, nocaon about 30% discount applied
Returning User Flow
1. Open app (auto authencaon)
2. Home screen with arst selecon and searchbar
3. View meditaon calendar via calendar tab
4. Select arst → view complete arst info
5. Set up session (guided or music-only)
6. Complete session
7. Calendar updates with new meditaon entry
8. Share opons:
o Share individual session achievement
o Share calendar (daily, monthly or yearly)
Calendar Viewing & Sharing Flow
1. Navigate to Calendar tab
2. Toggle between daily/monthly/yearly view
3. See color-coded meditaon history:
o Light shade: 1-5 minutes
o Medium shade: 6-15 minutes
o Darker shade: 16-30 minutes
o Darkest shade: 31+ minutes
4. View stascs (total minutes, longest streak)
5. Tap specic day to see session details
6. Share calendar:
o Select me period (specic day, current month, or year)
o Add oponal capon
o Choose sharing plaorm
o Post to social media
Tech Stack & APIs
Frontend
 Flutter 3.19+: Cross-platform framework for building the mobile application
o Dart 3.0+ for type safety and null safety features
o Material Design 3 components with custom theming
 State Management & Architecture
o Riverpod 2.3+: For reacve and testable state management
o Freezed: For immutable state models
o uer_hooks: For reusable stateful logic
 Navigation & Routing
o go_router 7.0+: Declarave roung with deep linking support
 UI Components & Visualization
o _chart: For stascs visualizaon
o custom_calendar_heatmap: Custom-built GitHub-style calendar visualizaon
o uer_svg: SVG rendering for vector graphics and illustraons
o cached_network_image: For ecient image loading and caching
o shimmer: For loading state animaons
 Audio
o just_audio 0.9.34+: Core audio playback funconality
o audio_service 0.18.9+: Background audio support
o audio_session: For managing audio focus and interrupons
 Utilities
o share_plus: For social sharing funconality
o intl: For date formang and localizaon
o uer_local_nocaons: For meditaon reminders
o uer_secure_storage: For secure storage of tokens
Backend (Supabase)
 Supabase 1.11+: Backend-as-a-Service plaorm providing:
o Authencaon with Row Level Security (RLS)
o PostgreSQL database
o Storage buckets for audio les and images
o Realme subscripons
APIs & Services
1. Authentication:
o Supabase Auth with the following providers:
 Email/password (with vericaon)
 Google OAuth
 Apple Sign-In
2. Database Services:
o Supabase PostgreSQL with the following tables:
 users
 arsts
 meditaon_tracks
 meditaon_sessions
 user_referrals
 arst_earnings
3. Storage:
o Supabase Storage with the following buckets:
 arst_images (public)
 audio_tracks (authencated access)
 user_avatars (authencated access)
Core Features
1. Artist-Centered Meditation Content
 Artist Profiles
o Professional photos of each arst
o Detailed biographies
 Music Collection
o 3-5 unique meditaon tracks per arst
o High-quality audio
o All tracks can be experienced with or without guided meditaon based on user
preference
 Artist Discovery
o Search by arst name
o Recently played arsts secon
2. Meditation Experience
 Session Setup
o Duraon selecon based on available set lengths
o Toggle between guided and music-only experiences (applies to all tracks)
 Meditaon Player
o Clean, distracon-free interface
o Large, clear countdown mer
o Background audio playback (connues when app is minimized)
o Pause/resume funconality
o Volume control
 Session Compleon
o Summary screen showing session details
o Total minutes meditated update
o Streak informaon
o Share opon for session compleon
o Return to home or start new session opons
3. GitHub-Style Calendar Tracking
 Calendar Visualizaon
o GitHub-style acvity calendar with color intensity
o Four disnct color levels based on duraon:
 Light shade: 1-5 minutes
 Medium shade: 6-15 minutes
 Darker shade: 16-30 minutes
 Darkest shade: 31+ minutes
o Empty cells for days with no meditaon
 Calendar Views
o Daily view (specic day details)
o Monthly view (default)
o Yearly view (scrollable)
 Stascs & Tracking
o Current streak counter (consecuve days)
o Longest streak record
o Total minutes meditated
o Total sessions completed
o Detailed day view showing all sessions
4. Sharing & Social Features
 Calendar Sharing
o Share daily, monthly or yearly calendar visualizaon
o Customizable sharing card with stascs
o Direct sharing to social plaorms
o Save to camera roll opon
 Session Sharing
o Share individual session compleons
o Customizable session cards showing arst informaon summary and minutes
meditated
o Opon to include quote or personal message
5. User Referral Program
 Referral Generaon
o Create personal referral link in sengs
o Share link directly to social plaorms or messaging apps
 Referral Benets
o 10% lifeme discount for each paying member referred
o Maximum 50% discount (aer 5 successful referrals)
o "Superfan" status achieved aer 5+ referrals
 Referral Tracking
o Track number of successful referrals
o View current discount percentage
o Monitor progress toward Superfan status
Navigation & UI Structure
Tab Structure
The app will use a simple 3-tab navigation structure:
1. Home Tab
o Arst selecon with searchbar at top
o Recently played arsts
o Quick start opons for meditaon
2. Calendar Tab
o GitHub-style meditaon acvity visualizaon
o Toggle between daily/monthly/yearly views
o Color intensity legend (showing minute ranges)
o Current and longest streak counters
o Total minutes meditated
o Day detail on tap (shows sessions for that day)
o Share buon for calendar
3. Settings Tab
o User informaon
o Create Referral Link buon
o Current referral discount status
o Number of successful referrals (X/5 for Superfan status)
o Minimal prole sengs
o Nocaon preferences toggle
o Log out opon
o App informaon
Navigation Patterns
 Tab bar will remain consistent across the app
 Deep links will work for sharing specic arsts or calendar views
 Back navigaon will be available for drill-down screens
 Modal screens will be used for session setup and meditaon player
Artist Partnership Model
Revenue Sharing Structure
 Equal partnership: 50/50 revenue split between arsts and plaorm
 Arsts receive 50% of subscripon revenue from users they refer to the app
 Plaorm retains 50% of revenue
 Arsts connue to receive their share from recurring subscripons of users they referred
 Once an arst joins, they remain a partner with ongoing revenue share
Referral & Social Promotion
 Each arst receives a unique referral link to share on their social plaorms
 Users who sign up through arst links receive 30% o their rst month only
 User aribuon to arsts is permanently tracked in the database
 Arsts are incenvized to regularly promote the app since they earn recurring revenue
 Monthly reports show arsts their referrals, earnings, and subscriber retenon
 Arsts are encouraged to menon the app in their social posts to drive subscripons
Music Sets & Guided Meditation
 Arsts upload their meditaon music as complete sets (no tagging or descripons
required inially)
 For MVP, arst onboarding will be handled manually by the app team
 Each set has a specic duraon (e.g., 15, 30, 60 minutes)
 User can only meditate for the duraon of the selected set
 No looping of music - the meditaon ends when the music set ends
 All guided meditaons will be provided by the app team, not the arsts
 Guided meditaon tracks will be created to be exible and work with various music
styles
Legal Protection
 Arsts must sign a simple agreement indemnifying the plaorm from copyright claims
 Arsts conrm they have full rights to all music uploaded
 Manual content review before publishing
In-Scope vs Out-of-Scope Items
In-Scope
1. User Authentication & Profiles
o Email, Google, Apple sign-in (using Supabase Auth)
o Basic user prole (name, avatar)
o Auto-login for returning users
2. Core Meditation Experience
o Timer funconality with precise ming
o Background audio playback (connues when app is minimized)
o Session compleon tracking
o Oponal beginning/ending bell sounds
o Ability to pause/resume sessions
o Toggle between guided and music-only opons for all tracks
3. Calendar Visualization
o GitHub-style acvity calendar with 4 color intensity levels
o Daily, monthly and yearly toggle views
o Current streak and longest streak counters
o Total meditaon minutes counter
o Day-specic session details on tap
4. Artist Content
o 10+ arsts at launch with complete proles
o 3-5 meditaon tracks per arst
o Both guided and music-only opons for all tracks
o Simple search by arst name
5. Sharing
o Calendar snapshots (daily, monthly or yearly views)
o Individual session compleon cards showing arst info and minutes meditated
o Integraon with major social plaorms
6. User Referral Program
o Referral link generaon
o Tracking of successful referrals
o Lifeme discount calculaon (10% per referral, up to 50%)
o Superfan status for 5+ successful referrals
Out-of-Scope (Future Considerations)
1. Advanced Social Features
o Friends/connecons system
o Group meditaons or concurrent sessions
o Meditaon challenges or compeons
o Comments or reacons on shared calendars
2. Content Creation
o User-generated content or recordings
o Community playlists or collecons
o User rangs or reviews of arsts/tracks
3. Advanced Analytics
o Mood tracking before/aer sessions
o Sleep quality correlaon
o Stress level tracking
o Correlaon of meditaon with other health metrics
4. Offline Mode
o Full oine funconality
o Download tracks for oine use
o Sync across devices when oine
5. Wearable Integration
o Apple Watch/WearOS companion apps
o Biometric feedback during meditaon
o Heart rate monitoring
6. Admin Dashboard
o Web-based admin interface for arst onboarding
o Content management system
o Analycs dashboard for team use
Architecture
Application Architecture
The application will follow a clean architecture pattern with the following layers:
1. Presentation Layer
o UI Components (Screens, Widgets)
o State Management (Riverpod Providers)
2. Domain Layer
o Use Cases
o Models
o Repository Interfaces
3. Data Layer
o Repositories Implementaon
o Data Sources (Supabase, Local Storage)
o DTOs (Data Transfer Objects)
Data Schema
users Table
CREATE TABLE users (
id UUID PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES auth.users(id),
email TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
display_name TEXT,
avatar_url TEXT,
created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL,
updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL,
last_login TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
notification_enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
total_meditation_minutes INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
longest_streak INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
current_streak INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
last_meditation_date DATE,
referring_artist_id UUID REFERENCES artists(id),
discount_applied BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
discount_expiry_date DATE,
referral_code TEXT UNIQUE,
referral_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
discount_percentage INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
is_superfan BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE
);
artists Table
CREATE TABLE artists (
id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
name TEXT NOT NULL,
bio TEXT NOT NULL,
short_bio TEXT NOT NULL,
image_url TEXT NOT NULL,
featured BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
revenue_share_percentage INTEGER DEFAULT 50,
referral_code TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL,
updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL
);
meditation_tracks Table
CREATE TABLE meditation_tracks (
id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
title TEXT NOT NULL,
artist_id UUID REFERENCES artists(id) NOT NULL,
audio_url TEXT NOT NULL,
audio_storage_path TEXT NOT NULL,
duration INTEGER NOT NULL, -- in seconds
created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL,
updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL
);
meditation_sessions Table
CREATE TABLE meditation_sessions (
id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id) NOT NULL,
track_id UUID REFERENCES meditation_tracks(id) NOT NULL,
duration INTEGER NOT NULL, -- actual session duration in seconds
is_guided BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, -- track whether user chose
guided or music-only
completed BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
completed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL,
date DATE NOT NULL, -- extracted date for easier querying
created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL,
-- RLS policies will ensure users can only see their own sessions
CONSTRAINT unique_user_session UNIQUE(user_id, track_id, completed_at)
);
user_referrals Table
CREATE TABLE user_referrals (
id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id) NOT NULL,
referrer_id UUID REFERENCES users(id),
artist_id UUID REFERENCES artists(id),
referral_date TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL,
discount_applied BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
subscription_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL,
CONSTRAINT unique_user_referral UNIQUE(user_id, COALESCE(referrer_id,
uuid_nil()), COALESCE(artist_id, uuid_nil()))
);
artist_earnings Table
CREATE TABLE artist_earnings (
id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
artist_id UUID REFERENCES artists(id) NOT NULL,
year INTEGER NOT NULL,
month INTEGER NOT NULL,
total_referred_users INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
active_subscribers INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
earnings_amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
is_paid BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL,
updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL,
CONSTRAINT unique_artist_month UNIQUE(artist_id, year, month)
);
State Management
The app will use Riverpod for state management with the following main providers:
1. AuthProvider
o Manages authencaon state
o Handles login, signup, logout
o Stores current user token
o Provides user authencaon state stream
o Manages referral tracking for new users
2. UserProvider
o Manages user prole data
o Handles user preferences
o Provides methods to update user prole
o Tracks referring arst and discount status
o Manages user referral program data
3. ArtistProvider
o Manages arst data fetching
o Provides ltered lists of arsts
o Handles search funconality
o Provides detailed arst informaon
o Manages arst referral links
4. MeditationProvider
o Manages current meditaon session
o Provides audio playback controls
o Handles mer funconality
o Manages session state (playing, paused, completed)
o Records session data on compleon
o Enforces meditaon me limit based on set duraon
o Handles guided/music-only toggle state
5. CalendarProvider
o Manages calendar data and stascs
o Calculates streaks and total minutes
o Provides data for calendar visualizaon
o Handles day-specic session data
o Manages calendar view state (daily/monthly/yearly)
6. ReferralProvider
o Handles user referral link generaon
o Tracks referral conversions
o Calculates discount percentages
o Manages Superfan status
Navigation
Go Router will be used for navigation with the following main routes:
1. /auth - Authentication flows
o /auth/login - Login screen
o /auth/signup - Signup screen
o /auth/reset-password - Password reset
2. /onboarding - First-time user experience
o /onboarding/welcome - Welcome screen
o /onboarding/app-intro - App concept introducon
o /onboarding/discount - Shows discount info if referred by arst
3. /home - Home tab (main landing screen)
o Shows arst selecon with search bar
4. /artists/:id - Artist details screen
o Arst biography, available tracks
o Opon to view arst referral details (if this is your referring arst)
5. /calendar - Calendar tab
o GitHub-style visualizaon of meditaon history
o /calendar/share - Calendar sharing opons
6. /calendar/day/:date - Specific day details
o Shows all meditaon sessions for a specic day
7. /settings - Settings tab
o User sengs and logout
o Referring arst informaon (if applicable)
o User referral program management
8. /meditation/setup - Session setup
o Duraon selecon, guided vs. music-only toggle
9. /meditation/player - Meditation player
o Full-screen player with mer and controls
10. /meditation/complete - Session completion
o Compleon screen with share opon and stats
11. /referrals - Referral management
o View referral stats and link
o Track progress to Superfan status
Development Phases
Phase 1: MVP Foundation (4 Weeks)
 Week 1: Project Setup & Authentication
o Fluer project setup with Supabase integraon
o Authencaon ows (email, Google, Apple)
o Supabase schema implementaon
o Basic navigaon structure
 Week 2: Core UI & Artist Content
o Home screen implementaon
o Arst search funconality
o Basic sengs screen
o 5-7 sample arsts with content
 Week 3: Meditation Player
o Audio playback implementaon
o Timer funconality
o Session tracking
o Background audio support
o Session compleon ow
 Week 4: Calendar Visualization & Referral System
o Calendar heatmap implementaon
o Session recording to database
o Basic stascs (total minutes, streaks)
o Calendar day/month/year toggle views
o User referral system implementaon
o Superfan status tracking
Success Metrics
User Engagement Metrics
 Daily Acve Users (DAU)
 Weekly retenon rate
 Average session duraon
 Number of meditaon sessions per user per week
 Streak length average
Business Metrics
 User acquision cost
 Conversion rate to paid subscripons
 Monthly recurring revenue
 Revenue per user
 Arst referral eecveness
App-Specific Metrics
 Number of user referrals generated
 Percentage of users reaching Superfan status
 Calendar sharing frequency
 Session sharing frequency
 Most popular arsts and tracks
